content: To avoid a rewrite when adding realtime later, keep notification writes behind a single service-layer function (e.g. notificationService.notify()) that persists to Postgres and is the sole call site invoked by business logic; a future transport (SSE/WebSocket) is added by having that same function additionally publish to an event emitter / Redis pub/sub channel, with the HTTP polling API remaining a fallback. This is the standard 'transport abstracted behind a publish interface' pattern.
